Is the user VEDA going to ask a question ever?

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2007-08-15 · 8 answers
or he does not need to, due to unprecedent karmic knowledge bonuses.
user [19] · 2007-08-15
if he asks anything it will be only for the benefit of us the conditioned souls and not because he doesnt know the answer.
user [2] · 2007-08-15
now, you ruined my thread :(
user [38] · 2007-08-15
Ok, here is one:

Is Vajra(nabha), Krishnas great-grandson, "one of few (4-5) survivors" (SB 1.15.22-23, 10.90.37) or the "only survivor" (KB 90)? SB 10.90.38-9 mentions his descendants. So could Krishnas seminal lineage survive until now?

I know that this sounds like the notorious Da Vinci Code but... ;)
user [2] · 2007-08-15
its not fair, you should start a thread, isnt that the system? :)
user [38] · 2007-08-15
I dont see a problem. This or that thread, question has been asked. ;)
user [2] · 2007-08-15
Is it not that all Yadu dynasty was self-destroyed?
user [38] · 2007-08-15
Well, thats the whole point about Prabhasa. The SB quotes say they were destroyed but not completely. So I wonder what happened with them.
user [19] · 2007-08-15
if you dont know it, who will?
